title: Gateway Session Cold/Warm Turns
objective: Start a normal gateway, send cold and warm user messages through the Gateway session API, and wait for final assistant text in chat history.

phases.title: Provision Dashboard Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw env without starting the gateway yet so Kova auth is applied before the gateway process boots.

phases.title: Start Gateway
phases.intent: Start the gateway after auth/provider config is already present in the OpenClaw home.

phases.title: Cold Gateway Session Turn
phases.intent: Create the Gateway session, send the first message through `sessions.send`, and verify the final assistant response is present in chat history.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/run-dashboard-session-send-turn.mjs --env {env} --session-key kova-dashboard-session-send --create-session true --min-assistant-count 1 --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --expected-text KOVA_AGENT_OK --timeout 120000

phases.title: Warm Gateway Session Turn
phases.intent: Reuse the same Gateway session, send a second message through `sessions.send`, and prove whether cold discovery/cache work disappears.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/run-dashboard-session-send-turn.mjs --env {env} --session-key kova-dashboard-session-send --create-session false --min-assistant-count 2 --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --expected-text KOVA_AGENT_OK --timeout 120000

phases.title: Post-Dashboard Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after dashboard-style cold and warm message turns.
